016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.TextNode;
021import org.apache.commons.cli.CommandLine;
022import org.apache.commons.cli.CommandLineParser;
023import org.apache.commons.cli.DefaultParser;
024import org.apache.commons.cli.help.HelpFormatter;
025import org.apache.commons.cli.Options;
026import org.apache.commons.cli.ParseException;
027import org.apache.commons.cli.help.OptionFormatter;
028import org.apache.commons.cli.help.TextHelpAppendable;
029import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.DefaultRpcClient;
030import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.CompositeTrustManager;
031import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcMessage;
032import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcRequest;
033import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcResponse;
034import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli.config.JsonRpcConfigFile;
035import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli.config.JsonRpcServerConfigEntry;
036import org.slf4j.Logger;
037import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
038
039import javax.net.ssl.SSLContext;
040import java.io.FileNotFoundException;
041import java.io.IOException;
042import java.io.OutputStreamWriter;
043import java.io.PrintStream;
044import java.io.PrintWriter;
045import java.net.URI;
046import java.net.URISyntaxException;
047import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
048import java.nio.file.Path;
049import java.security.KeyManagementException;
050import java.security.KeyStoreException;
051import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;
052import java.security.cert.CertificateException;
053import java.util.List;
054import java.util.Optional;
055import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
056import java.util.logging.Level;
057import java.util.spi.ToolProvider;
058
059/**
060 * An abstract base class for JsonRpcClientTool that implements ToolProvider and uses Apache Commons CLI
061 */
062public abstract class BaseJsonRpcTool implements JsonRpcClientTool, ToolProvider {
063    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(BaseJsonRpcTool.class);
064    private static final String name = "jrpc";
065    protected static final URI defaultUri = URI.create("http://localhost:8080/");
066    protected final String usage ="jrpc [-c config-id | -u url] [option...] method [param...]";
067    protected final StringBuilder helpStringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
068    private final TextHelpAppendable helpSerializer = new TextHelpAppendable(helpStringBuilder);
069
070    protected final HelpFormatter formatter = HelpFormatter.builder()
071                    .setOptionFormatBuilder(OptionFormatter.builder().setLongOptPrefix("--"))
072                    .setShowSince(false)
073                    .setHelpAppendable(helpSerializer)
074                    .get();
075    protected JsonRpcMessage.Version jsonRpcVersion = JsonRpcMessage.Version.V2;
076    protected JsonRpcClientTool.OutputObject outputObject = OutputObject.RESULT;
077    //protected JsonRpcClientTool.OutputFormat outputFormat = OutputFormat.JSON;
078    protected final JsonRpcClientTool.OutputStyle outputStyle = OutputStyle.PRETTY;
079
080    @Override
081    public String name() {
082        return name;
083    }
084
085    public String usage() {
086        return usage;
087    }
088
089    abstract public Options options();
090
091    public CommonsCLICall createCall(PrintWriter out, PrintWriter err, String... args) {
092        return new CommonsCLICall(this, out, err, args);
093    }
094
095    public CommonsCLICall createCall(PrintStream out, PrintStream err, String... args) {
096        return createCall(writerFromStream(out), writerFromStream(err), args);
097    }
098
099    private PrintWriter writerFromStream(PrintStream stream) {
100        return new PrintWriter(new OutputStreamWriter(stream, StandardCharsets.UTF_8), true);
101
102    }
103
104    @Override
105    public int run(PrintWriter out, PrintWriter err, String... args) {
106        try {
107            CommonsCLICall call = createCall(out, err, args);
108            run(call);
109        } catch (ToolException e) {
110            return e.resultCode;
111        } catch (Exception e) {
112            throw new RuntimeException((e));
113        }
114        return 0;
115    }
116
117    public void run(CommonsCLICall call) {
118        log.info("argv[0]: {}", executableName().orElse("unknown"));
119        List<String> args = call.line.getArgList();
120        if (args.isEmpty()) {
121            printError(call, "JSON-RPC method required");
122            printHelp(call.err, usage);
123            throw new ToolException(1, "JSON-RPC method required");
124        }
125        if (call.line.hasOption("response")) {
126            // Print full JsonRpcResponse as output
127            outputObject = OutputObject.RESPONSE;
128        }
129        if (call.line.hasOption("V1")) {
130            jsonRpcVersion = JsonRpcMessage.Version.V1;
131        }
132        SSLContext sslContext = sslContext(call.line);
133        String resultForPrinting;
134        try (DefaultRpcClient client = call.rpcClient(sslContext)) {
135            CliParameterParser parser = new CliParameterParser(jsonRpcVersion, client.getMapper());
136            JsonRpcRequest request = parser.parse(args);
137            JsonRpcResponse<JsonNode> response;
138            try {
139                response = client.sendRequestForResponseAsync(request).get();
140            } catch (ExecutionException ee) {
141                log.error("send execution exception: ", ee);
142                Throwable t = ee.getCause() != null ? ee.getCause() : ee;
143                throw new ToolException(1, t.getMessage());
144            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
145                log.error("send interrupted exception: ", e);
146                throw new ToolException(1, e.getMessage());
147            }
148            resultForPrinting = formatResponse(response, client.getMapper());
149        }
150        call.out.println(resultForPrinting);
151    }
152
153    SSLContext sslContext(CommandLine line) {
154        SSLContext sslContext;
155        if (line.hasOption("add-truststore")) {
156            // Create SSL sockets using additional truststore and CompositeTrustManager
157            String trustStorePathString = line.getOptionValue("add-truststore");
158            Path trustStorePath = Path.of(trustStorePathString);
159            try {
160                sslContext = CompositeTrustManager.getCompositeSSLContext(trustStorePath);
161            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException | KeyManagementException | FileNotFoundException e) {
162                throw new ToolException(1, e.getMessage());
163            }
164        } else if (line.hasOption("alt-truststore")) {
165            // Create SSL sockets using alternate truststore
166            String trustStorePathString = line.getOptionValue("alt-truststore");
167            Path trustStorePath = Path.of(trustStorePathString);
168            try {
169                sslContext = CompositeTrustManager.getAlternateSSLContext(trustStorePath);
170            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException | KeyManagementException | CertificateException | KeyStoreException | IOException e) {
171                throw new ToolException(1, e.getMessage());
172            }
173        } else {
174            // Otherwise, use the default SSLContext
175            try {
176                sslContext = SSLContext.getDefault();
177            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {
178                throw new RuntimeException(e);
179            }
180        }
181        return sslContext;
182    }
183
184    private String formatResponse(JsonRpcResponse<?> response, ObjectMapper mapper) {
185        return (response.getResult() == null || response.getError() != null || outputObject == OutputObject.RESPONSE)
186            ? mapper.valueToTree(response).toPrettyString() // Pretty print the entire response as JSON
187            : switch (response.getResult()) {
188                case TextNode tn    -> tn.asText();         // Remove the surrounding quotes and don't print `\n` for newlines
189                case JsonNode jn    -> outputStyle == OutputStyle.PRETTY ? jn.toPrettyString() : jn.toString();
190                case Object obj     -> obj.toString();
191            };
192    }
193
194    public void printHelp(PrintWriter pw, String usage) {
195        String header = """
196Examples:
197
198Call to 'default' server in 'config.toml':
199
200    jrpc getblockhash 1
201
202Get help for id 'main' in 'config.toml':
203
204    jrpc -c main getblockhash 1
205
206Call a server with a URL:
207
208    jrpc -u http://user:pass@localhost:18443 getblockhash 1
209""";
210        String footer = "";
211        try {
212            formatter.printHelp(usage, header, options(), footer, false);
213        } catch (IOException e) {
214            throw new RuntimeException(e);
215        }
216        String help = helpStringBuilder.toString();
217        pw.println(help);
218    }
219
220    public void printError(CommonsCLICall call, String str) {
221        call.err.println(str);
222    }
223
224    public static class CommonsCLICall  {
225        public final PrintWriter out;
226        public final PrintWriter err;
227        public final String[] args;
228        protected final BaseJsonRpcTool rpcTool;
229        public final CommandLine line;
230        public final boolean verbose;
231        private DefaultRpcClient client;
232
233        public CommonsCLICall(BaseJsonRpcTool parentTool, PrintWriter out, PrintWriter err, String[] args) {
234            this.out = out;
235            this.err = err;
236            this.args = args;
237            this.rpcTool = parentTool;
238            CommandLineParser parser = new DefaultParser();
239            try {
240                this.line = parser.parse(rpcTool.options(), args);
241            } catch (ParseException e) {
242                rpcTool.printError(this, e.getMessage());
243                rpcTool.printHelp(this.err, rpcTool.usage());   // print help to stderr
244                throw new JsonRpcClientTool.ToolException(1, "Parser error");
245            }
246            // Logging should be (one of?) the first thing(s) configured from command-line options
247            Level level = parseLogLevel(line);
248            JavaLoggingSupport.setLogLevel(level);
249            verbose = line.hasOption("v");
250
251            boolean help = line.hasOption("?");
252            if (help) {
253                rpcTool.printHelp(this.out, rpcTool.usage());  // Print help to stdout
254                throw new JsonRpcClientTool.ToolException(0, "Help Option was chosen");
255            }
256            // TODO: Add rpcwait option for non-Bitcoin JsonRPC???
257        }
258
259        Level parseLogLevel(CommandLine line) {
260            Level level = Level.WARNING;    // Default level
261            boolean verbose = line.hasOption("v");
262            if (verbose) {
263                level = Level.INFO;          // Verbose enables "INFO" (for now)
264            }
265            // "-log" overrides "-v"
266            boolean hasLogLevel = line.hasOption("log");
267            if (hasLogLevel) {
268                String intLevel = line.getOptionValue("log");
269                level = switch (intLevel) {
270                    case "0" -> Level.OFF;
271                    case "1" -> Level.SEVERE;
272                    case "2" -> Level.WARNING;
273                    case "3" -> Level.INFO;
274                    case "4" -> Level.FINE;
275                    case "5" -> Level.ALL;
276                    default -> throw new IllegalStateException("Unexpected value: " + intLevel);
277                };
278            }
279            return level;
280        }
281
282        public DefaultRpcClient rpcClient(SSLContext sslContext) {
283            JsonRpcConfigFile configFile = JsonRpcConfigFile.fromDefaultConfigFile();
284            log.info("If no command-line url option, will use config in: {}", configFile.path());
285
286            if (client == null) {
287                URI uri;
288                String urlString;
289                String rpcUser = null;
290                String rpcPassword = null;
291                if ((urlString = line.getOptionValue("url")) != null ) {
292                    // URL specified on the command-line
293                    try {
294                        uri = new URI(urlString);
295                    } catch (URISyntaxException e) {
296                        throw new RuntimeException(e);
297                    }
298                } else if (configFile.exists()) {
299                    // TOML Configuration File exists
300                    String configId;
301                    if (line.hasOption("c")) {
302                        configId = line.getOptionValue("c");
303                    } else {
304                        configId = "default";
305                    }
306                    log.info("Reading '{}' server from: {}", configId, configFile.path());
307                    JsonRpcServerConfigEntry config = configFile.readOne(configId);
308                    uri = config.getUri();
309                    rpcUser = config.getUsername();
310                    rpcPassword = config.getPassword();
311                } else {
312                    // Use compiled-in defaultUri
313                    uri = defaultUri;
314                }
315                // If username/password can be extracted from the URI and nothing is set yet, use those
316                String rawUserInfo = uri.getRawUserInfo();
317                if (rpcUser == null && rawUserInfo != null) {
318                    String[] split = rawUserInfo.split(":");
319                    rpcUser = split[0];
320                    rpcPassword = split[1];
321                }
322                client = new DefaultRpcClient(sslContext, rpcTool.jsonRpcVersion, uri, rpcUser, rpcPassword);
323            }
324            return client;
325        }
326
327        public DefaultRpcClient rpcClient() {
328            SSLContext sslContext;
329            try {
330                sslContext = SSLContext.getDefault();
331            } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {
332                throw new RuntimeException(e);
333            }
334            return rpcClient(sslContext);
335        }
336    }
337
338    static Optional<String> executableName () {
339        return ProcessHandle.current().info()
340                .command()
341                .map(c -> c.substring(c.lastIndexOf('/') + 1));
342    }
343}
